creator: craig001@lerwick.hopto.org
text:
Hello Folks

Recently been having issues with systray icons not being visible or clickable when running wine programs.

A quick google showed it's a know issue and a patch/release has already been commited.

That commit has not made it into our port yet.  So its fixed upstream but still broke for us.

I pulled the diff from;
https://github.com/fluxbox/fluxbox/pull/19

and dropped it into the files/ directory in the port, and then made and deinstall/install -- my wine programs now correctly display it's systray icon and they are now clickable.

Worth having this patch until we caught up with upstream.

Kind Regards

Craig Butler
